title: Empyrean Exalt
content:
This is the second of the four special Titles bestowed upon renowned experts even within the 
Void Tribulant
 Stage.

This title refers to people at Peak of 
Void Tribulant
. If one could break through into peak 
Void Tribulant
, then they would become a False Empyrean Exalt, or just be called Empyrean Exalt.
However the main reason this "Peak Void Tribulant" is so special on its own is due to the fact that at this level an individual can fuse Dao directly into their bodies. This eliminates the concept of incantation and casting time for spells and even allows the practice of stacking spells. Ultimately, Empyrean Exalts are defined by this ability and the number of spells they can simultaneously stack, from 2 to 99, indicates their ability. Being able to stack 100+ spells is ultimately the criterion for an Ascendant Empyrean.

There are only around 1,000 Empyrean Exalts among the trillions of people that inhabit the 
Immortal Astral Continent
 and its countless Cave Worlds.

At this level one is qualified to enter the 
Empyrean Exalt Trial.
